# SopKit — Detailed capabilities index

> SopKit is a secure, zero-trust web utility platform. All operations (formatting, compression, conversions) occur client-side inside the user's browser sandbox using HTML5 APIs, Canvas, and WebAssembly. No user files are ever uploaded or saved to remote databases, preventing compliance leaks.

Canonical Base URL: https://sopkit.github.io

## Core Architecture & Security Model

- **100% Client-Side execution**: Utilizes WebAssembly binaries and standard browser canvas pipelines. Files remain on local disk.
- **Compliance friendly**: Meets strict GDPR, HIPAA, and corporate data leakage prevention (DLP) requirements since no server transit occurs.
- **Offline operational capacity**: Fully deployable inside local networks and corporate intranets.

### Text Tools Tools

#### [Text Reverser](https://sopkit.github.io/text-reverser)
- **Description**: Flip your text backwards or reverse the order of words instantly for creative projects and coding.

#### [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://sopkit.github.io/remove-duplicate-lines)
- **Description**: Clean up your lists and data by automatically removing identical lines of text. Fast and private.

#### [Markdown to HTML Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/markdown-to-html)
- **Description**: Convert Markdown text into clean HTML code for your website, blog, or email newsletters.

#### [Markdown to PDF Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/markdown-to-pdf)
- **Description**: Convert Markdown text into a clean, print-ready PDF document instantly.

### PDF Tools Tools

#### [Compress PDF to Exact KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-pdf-to-exact-kb)
- **Description**: Compress PDF files to exact sizes like 100KB, 200KB, 500KB, or custom KB for forms and uploads online.

- **Description**: Delete unwanted pages from a PDF file online. Select pages, remove them, and download a clean PDF for free.

- **Description**: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images online. Download each page as an image or ZIP file.

- **Description**: Calculate the exact duration between two dates in years, months, weeks, days, hours, and minutes.

- **Description**: Calculate the number of working days or business days between two dates, excluding weekends and holidays.

### Exam Image & Form Tools Tools

#### [SSC Photo and Signature Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/ssc-photo-signature-resizer)

- **Description**: Resize and compress NEET photo and signature for application forms. Adjust size, dimensions, format, and file limit online.

### Health & Fitness Tools

#### [BMR Calculator (Basal Metabolic Rate)](https://sopkit.github.io/bmr-calculator)
- **Description**: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) to understand how many calories your body burns at rest.

#### [TDEE Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/tdee-calculator)
- **Description**: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) based on your activity level and fitness goals.

#### [Macro Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/macro-calculator)
- **Description**: Calculate your ideal macronutrient ratio (protein, carbs, fats) for weight loss, gain, or maintenance.

#### [Ideal Body Weight Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/ideal-body-weight-calculator)
- **Description**: Determine your healthy weight range based on your height, age, and gender using standard formulas.

#### [Body Fat Percentage Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/body-fat-calculator)
- **Description**: Estimate your body fat percentage using US Navy or BMI methods for a clearer picture of your fitness.
